sources.title: AI Inference Market Size, Share & Latest Trends, 2025 To 2030
sources.claim: AI inference market valued at $106.15B in 2025; projected to reach $254.98B by 2030 at 19.2% CAGR

sources.title: AI Inference Market Size And Trends | Industry Report, 2030
sources.claim: Global AI inference market estimated at $97.24B in 2024; CAGR of 17.5% from 2025-2030

sources.title: Baseten Raises $1.5 Billion to Power the Next Era of AI Inference
sources.claim: Baseten raises $1.5B Series F at $13B valuation; ARR grew 1,900% YoY to ~$600M; processes 1B+ inference calls/day across 87 clusters on 18 clouds

sources.title: Together AI Raises $800M: Open-Source Inference Breaks $1B as Closed Models Stall
sources.claim: Together AI raises $800M Series C at $8.3B valuation; annual bookings exceed $1.15B

sources.title: CES 2026: AI compute sees a shift from training to inference
sources.claim: Inference workloads to account for ~67% of all AI compute in 2026, up from 33% in 2023

sources.title: Why AI's next phase will likely demand more computational power, not less
sources.claim: Generative AI computing shifts from training-centric to inference-centric in 2026; inference will account for majority of AI compute by 2030

sources.title: Cerebras Systems Inc. Form 8-K — Q1 FY2026 Financial Results
sources.claim: Cerebras Q1 2026 revenue $193.4M; multi-year OpenAI deal for 750MW valued at over $20B; IPO'd at ~$66B market cap

sources.title: Fireworks AI Is Reportedly Seeking a $15 Billion Valuation
sources.claim: Fireworks AI seeks $15B valuation — 3.75x jump from $4B Series C in Oct 2025; $800M ARR as of May 2026

sources.title: Baseten $1.5B Raise and the AI Inference Gold Rush
sources.claim: Baseten ARR grew from ~$200M (Dec 2025) to ~$600M (Mar 2026); analysts expect inference to account for two-thirds of AI compute demand by end of 2026

sources.title: AI Inference Economics: The 1,000× Cost Collapse Reshaping GPUs
sources.claim: GPT-4-class inference cost fell from ~$20/million tokens (late 2022) to under $0.40/million tokens in early 2026 — a ~98% reduction in under 4 years

sources.title: After Nvidia's Groq deal, meet the other AI chip startups that may be in play
sources.claim: NVIDIA acquired Groq (LPU inference hardware) for a reported ~$20B in late 2025, marking inference hardware as a standalone M&A category

sources.title: AI Inference and World Model Startups Pull $1.8B in Two Days as Foundation Models Commoditize
sources.claim: $1.8B raised by inference infrastructure startups in two days in June 2026; foundation model commoditization is the structural driver

sources.title: AI Inference Market Size to Hit USD 254.98 Billion by 2030
sources.claim: Edge AI inference growing at 38.6% CAGR — the fastest segment within AI infrastructure

sources.title: Q1 2026: The Quarter AI Infrastructure Became Energy-Constrained
sources.claim: Q1 2026 marked AI infrastructure transitioning from capital-constrained to energy-constrained; 20% of planned data center projects face power grid blocks

sources.title: August 2026 EU AI Act Deadline: Is Your Robotics Company Ready?
sources.claim: EU AI Act fully applicable from August 2, 2026; mandates energy transparency and documentation for AI systems including inference APIs

unverified_claims.claim: Search volume ~120K/month for 'AI inference' and related terms
unverified_claims.note: [unverified] — estimated from Google Trends signals and market interest indicators; Keyword Everywhere API data not retrieved for this report

unverified_claims.claim: AI inference market was approximately $10B in 2021
unverified_claims.note: [unverified] — inferred from historical compute market data; category was not tracked independently before 2022 ChatGPT launch

unverified_claims.claim: HIPAA-compliant inference commands 40-80% pricing premium over standard API rates
unverified_claims.note: [unverified] — based on industry conversations and pricing analysis; no formal published study available at time of research
